response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two distinct vocal songs based on on-screen text: '六兆年と一夜物語' and 'Star-mine'. 2. Identified the performers: Kazama Iroha for the first song, and Kazama Iroha, Momosuzu Nene, and Shishiro Botan for the second song. 3. Used the web search tool to find the original composer/artist and official lyrics for each song, avoiding quotes and using original language keywords. 4. Mapped the scenes based on the song transitions found in the video. 5. Compiled the lyrics and metadata into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video features a live performance by Kazama Iroha, beginning with the song '六兆年と一夜物語' (Six Trillion Years and Overnight Story), followed by a performance of the song 'Star-mine' by Kazama Iroha, Momosuzu Nene, and Shishiro Botan.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha performs the song '六兆年と一夜物語'. The on-screen text identifies the song.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
名も無き時代の集落の
名も無き幼き少年の
誰も知らない おとぎばなし
生まれついた時から
忌み子 鬼の子として
その身に余る 罰を受けた
悲しい事は 何も無いけど
夕焼け小焼け 手を引かれてさ
知らない 知らない 僕は何も知らない
叱られた後のやさしさも
雨上がりの手の温もりも
でも本当は 本当は 本当は 本当に寒いんだ
死なない 死なない 僕は何で死なない？
夢のひとつも見れないくせに
誰も知らない おとぎばなしは
夕焼けの中に吸い込まれて 消えてった
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In a nameless era's village,
There was a nameless young boy.
It was a fairytale nobody knew.
From the moment he was born,
As an ill-omened child, a child of a demon,
He received punishment beyond what his body could bear.
There wasn't really anything sad about it,
But when sunset came, his hand would be pulled,
"I don't know, I don't know, I don't know anything," I'd say,
Even the kindness after being scolded,
Even the warmth of a hand after the rain,
But the truth is, the truth is, the truth is, it's really cold.
"I won't die, I won't die, why won't I die?"
Even though I can't even have a single dream,
The fairytale nobody knows,
Disappeared, absorbed into the sunset.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha, Momosuzu Nene, and Shishiro Botan perform the song 'Star-mine'. The on-screen text identifies the song.
scenes.performer_in_video: Kazama Iroha, Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
風を置いて 雨を抜けて 咲き誇れ
あぁ、夜風に揺られている
折れないように 怯えている
ずっと雨に濡らされている
またどうしたって 凍えてしまったんだ
誰か この声に応答して
痛がるばっかで 咲けないままのハートを
あぁ、今 見逃せないくらい
綺麗に咲かせたいんだ
光っていた未来が
ずっと待っていた世界が
きらめく音の中にあるなら
最低で最悪な涙も
痛がりで嫌いな声も
連れていきたいんだ
全部 不完全な毎日が
一瞬のカケラたちが 重なって
こんな歌を奏でたら
それは言葉だけじゃ届かない距離を
きっと飛び越えて 結ぶ
きっと 輪を描いていく
さぁ 涙を拭いて 喉を鳴らして
心臓が ペースアップしていく
怖がらないで ノッテけ
飛んで 浮いて ベロを回して
グルーヴと ランデヴしていく
こんがらがっちゃ つまんないもんね
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Leaving the wind, passing through the rain, bloom in full pride.
Ah, swaying in the night wind,
Afraid of not breaking,
Always getting soaked in the rain,
And frozen up again.
Someone, respond to this voice.
With a heart that only feels pain and cannot bloom,
Ah, I want to make it bloom beautifully, so I can't look away now.
If the future that was shining,
The world that was always waiting,
Is in the sparkling sound,
I want to take along the worst, most terrible tears,
And the voice that hates feeling pain.
If all these incomplete days,
These pieces of a moment overlap,
And play such a song,
It will surely cross the distance that words alone cannot reach,
And bind them together,
Surely, it will draw a circle.
Come, wipe your tears, clear your throat,
Your heartbeat is speeding up.
Don't be afraid, ride on it,
Fly, float, move your tongue,
Rendezvous with the groove.
Getting tangled up is boring, isn't it?
